name: SCC_ServiceDetailReq
title: SCC_ServiceDetailReq
syntax: void SCC_ServiceDetailReq ( byte SessionID[], dword ServiceId )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Service Detail Request is received.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
